series_name: 90 Days of AI: Tools, Agents, Generative AI, and What Comes Next
notes: Topics are ordered as a progressive blog series: AI foundations, generative AI, agentic AI, tools, production patterns, business use cases, governance, and emerging trends.

topics.title: What Is an LLM? The Clearest Explanation for Builders
topics.angle: Explain tokens, training, next-token prediction, context windows, and why LLMs matter without research-paper fog.
topics.image_idea: Token chips flowing through neural network layers into probability bars.

topics.title: Generative AI vs Traditional AI: Same Family, Different Superpowers
topics.angle: Compare predictive AI, rule-based systems, and generative models with practical examples.
topics.image_idea: Split diagram: classifier output vs content generation output.

topics.title: Why AI Suddenly Feels Everywhere in 2026
topics.angle: Cover adoption, better models, cheaper inference, enterprise pilots, and AI moving from novelty to workflow.
topics.image_idea: AI spreading from chat apps into office, code, commerce, and devices.

topics.title: Prompt Engineering Is Not Dead, It Just Got a Real Job
topics.angle: Move beyond clever prompts into context design, constraints, examples, and output validation.
topics.image_idea: Prompt builder pipeline with goal, context, constraints, and output format.

topics.title: Context Engineering: The Skill Behind Better AI Outputs
topics.angle: Explain how files, docs, examples, memory, and tool results shape model behavior.
topics.image_idea: Model surrounded by context blocks: docs, logs, tools, examples.

topics.title: Tokens Are the New Compute Meter: Why AI Costs Feel Weird
topics.angle: Explain input tokens, output tokens, context size, caching, and why long answers cost more.
topics.image_idea: Token meter connected to model usage and cost dashboard.

topics.title: Temperature, Top-p, and Why Your AI Sometimes Gets Spicy
topics.angle: Explain decoding settings using examples for coding, brainstorming, and structured JSON.
topics.image_idea: Dial from boring precise output to creative wild output.

topics.title: Embeddings Explained: Search by Meaning, Not Just Keywords
topics.angle: Teach semantic search, vector similarity, and practical uses like support docs and internal knowledge search.
topics.image_idea: Documents plotted as dots near related meaning clusters.

topics.title: RAG Explained: Giving AI an Open-Book Exam
topics.angle: Explain retrieval-augmented generation, chunking, embeddings, citations, and common mistakes.
topics.image_idea: Question retrieving document chunks before model answer.

topics.title: Fine-Tuning vs RAG: Which One Should You Actually Use?
topics.angle: Clarify when to use prompt context, RAG, fine-tuning, and model customization.
topics.image_idea: Decision tree for prompt, RAG, fine-tune, or tool use.

topics.title: What Is Agentic AI? From Chatbots to AI That Takes Action
topics.angle: Define AI agents, planning, tool use, memory, execution, and human oversight.
topics.image_idea: Agent loop: goal, plan, act, observe, revise.

topics.title: AI Agents vs AI Assistants: The Difference That Actually Matters
topics.angle: Compare assistants that respond with agents that complete multi-step work.
topics.image_idea: Assistant answering chat vs agent operating tools across apps.

topics.title: The Agent Loop: Plan, Act, Observe, Repeat
topics.angle: Break down the core control loop behind agents with a simple coding/task example.
topics.image_idea: Circular flow diagram with planning and observation checkpoints.

topics.title: Tool-Using AI: When the Model Stops Guessing and Starts Checking
topics.angle: Show how agents call APIs, calculators, databases, search, code runners, and validators.
topics.image_idea: Model connected to calculator, browser, database, and code runner.

topics.title: Multi-Agent Systems: When One AI Intern Is Not Enough
topics.angle: Explain specialized agents, coordinator agents, debate patterns, and failure modes.
topics.image_idea: Team of specialized agents reporting to an orchestrator.

topics.title: Agent Orchestration: The Microservices Moment for AI
topics.angle: Connect agent orchestration to familiar software architecture concepts.
topics.image_idea: Agent services communicating like microservices with shared state.

topics.title: MCP Explained: Why AI Tools Need a Common Plug
topics.angle: Explain Model Context Protocol-style tool integration and why standard connectors matter.
topics.image_idea: Universal adapter connecting AI app to files, APIs, and databases.

topics.title: Agent-to-Agent Communication: Can AI Systems Talk to Each Other?
topics.angle: Cover emerging agent interoperability, handoffs, shared goals, and governance challenges.
topics.image_idea: Two agents exchanging task packets through a protocol layer.

topics.title: Computer-Using Agents: AI That Clicks Buttons So You Do Not Have To
topics.angle: Explain agents that use browsers/desktops, practical workflows, and risks.
topics.image_idea: AI cursor navigating browser tabs with a human approval checkpoint.

topics.title: AI Agents in the Browser: The New Front Door to Work
topics.angle: Discuss browser-native agents, web automation, research, shopping, and productivity.
topics.image_idea: Browser window with agent sidebar executing tasks.

topics.title: Coding Agents: Pair Programmer, Debugger, or Chaos Button?
topics.angle: Evaluate coding agents, repo context, tests, diffs, reviews, and safe workflows.
topics.image_idea: Coding agent reading tests, editing files, and running verification.

topics.title: How to Use AI for Debugging Without Making the Bug Wear a Hat
topics.angle: Practical workflow for stack traces, reproduction steps, logs, and patch verification.
topics.image_idea: Bug report flowing through logs, hypothesis, patch, and tests.

topics.title: AI Code Review: What Models Catch and What Humans Still Own
topics.angle: Explain strengths, weaknesses, review prompts, false confidence, and security-sensitive checks.

topics.title: AI Test Generation: Great Servant, Suspicious Master

topics.title: Vibe Coding vs Engineering: Where AI Helps and Where It Hurts

topics.title: AI for API Integration: From Docs to Working Calls Faster

topics.angle: Explain offline evals, golden datasets, human grading, regression tests, and rubrics.

topics.title: AI Observability: Watching the Model Before It Starts Freelancing
topics.angle: Cover tracing, prompt logs, tool calls, latency, cost, drift, and hallucination monitoring.
